arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim goes on striker selling spree
arts.sum: Zirkzee, meanwhile, joined United this past summer for €42m from Bologna but has been a huge disappointment with just three Premier League goals. Hojlund arrived in the summer of 2023 from Atalanta for €85 million but has scored just 12 Premier League goals in 41 games.
